pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh which copies the source .ork file to this exact path and modifies it.
Verified from export_result.sh and verifier.py which explicitly check these four exact file paths for the user's report.
Verified via verifier.py which evaluates the score out of 100 possible points and considers a score >= 60 as passing.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the built-in 'A simple model rocket.ork' example originally created by Sampo Niskanen, modified by the setup script to inject blunt 150x150mm rectangular fins. The target rocket file must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/simple_model_rocket.ork'. The required analysis report can be saved to any of four accepted paths (e.g., '/home/ga/Documents/exports/fin_redesign_report.txt'). The task is passed if the agent earns at least 60 points out of 100 based on adding fin taper, sweep, changing the root chord, ensuring a successful flight simulation, and providing a report with required keywords.
